strategy_context.source: Deep analysis autotrade plan for screener winner NZDSGD
strategy_context.bridge_limit_note: Current EA scaffold supports one executable entry only, so the live ticket uses the midpoint of the recommended sell zone.
strategy_context.bridge_tp_note: Bridge schema supports one live TP only; TP2 is used as the executable TP while TP1 remains a reporting/management level.

note: NZDSGD paper autotrade for market reopen. Default risk budget 100 USD. Short rally into EMA band using a midpoint sell-limit; SL anchored to 1D invalidation.
